items.name: Public UGC Vending Machine, “The Rugpull Machine”
items.description:
It’s 2025, public UGC has been out for a little less than a year now. Limiteds have long been rugpulled, leaving many people baffled and heartbroken for what Roblox allowed to happen to the catalog. “I didn’t think *I* would get rugpulled!”, they cry out. PeakUGC sits abandoned due to the sheer mass of clone items, though he fought valiantly, there was no keeping up with them. 

Now, full limited copies can be had for as little as a quarter, available in every recommended section. The best selling item of all time is a 15 rbx Epic Face, with a 2-piece Valkyrie Helm close behind it.
